description: Curated section map for Duncan's Masonic Ritual (1866). Injects a '## <title>' heading before the first '#### Page N' marker of each listed page. Page numbers refer to the '#### Page N' markers in the consolidated markdown (post duncan_section_map_apply).

sections.title: Opening the Lodge: Officer Stations and Duties
